name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: Wednesday Worlds:  CIS Training Systems Group Ride
description:
Boost your sustainable power output in just 60 minutes! Join the CIS Skills and Drills Wednesday Worlds Training Ride. Aim for a thrilling pace of 2.7 to 3.2 w/kg average while mastering group riding skills and ride dynamics, and turbo-charge your performance with cadence, gearing, and heart rate control. Unleash your potential – ride with us weekly for an exhilarating cycling experience!

Duration: 60 Minutes
Target Pace: 2.7 to 3.2 w/kg (average)
Location: www.ciscycling.com

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: Bike MS - Wednesday Night Wahoos
description:
Bike MS Wednesday Night Wahoos is a Banded Ride for those looking to explore the many worlds of Zwitt. Just like the many Bike MS Events across the US there is something for everyone. Whether you have a connection to multiple sclerosis or are just along for the experience (points) we are excited to have you along for the journey. Whatever the wekly route is, come join a group of passionate cyclists looking to raise funds and awarenes for those living with multiple sclerosis. All Zwift riders are welcome as we ride for a world free of MS. We hope you enjoy the ride and if so, please join Bike MS Zwift Club for year round training and community engagement. Come for the miles of smiles and stay for the XP. 
Bike MS is the largest charity cycling series across the United States consisting of 50 rides and raising over $50 million in 2024 for the National MS Society. Bike MS supports the National MS Society's mission to Cure MS while empowing all people affected by MS to live their best lives. Whether you want to cross the Finish Line in person or take on a new challenge from anywhere — there’s a Bike MS event that’s right for you! 
Check out www.bikeMS.org and experience the ride of your life. Use code Zwift25 for a discount when signing up for a Bike MS in person event.
Come join us for weekly Club Rides: Bike MS ZC
#dontjustride #bikeMS #whateverittakes #strongertogether

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: TFC's Uncanny Ride
description:
IT'S TIME TO UNLEASH YOUR INNER SUPERHERO! Join TFC's Multiverse Characters for an epic ride like no other! Deadpool's got his mouth ready, Quicksilver's got his speed, Loki's got his... well, Loki's got his tricks up his sleeve! Rocket's blasting off, Colossus is flexing, Preacher's preaching, Gambit's got his cards, Hawkeye's got his aim, BEAST is beastly, Ghost Rider's got his flames, Silver Surfer's soaring, Iceman's chilling, Green Goblin's... well, being a goblin, and Longshot's got his... long shot! This is a 2.0 Recover Ride, but don't get too comfortable, because we've got a 5-MINUTE SHOWDOWN AT THE END! If you're feeling fierce and want to push it like a SUPERHERO, stay behind the Ride Leader and GET READY TO UNLEASH YOUR INNER POWER! Are you ready to ride with the heroes? LET'S DO THIS!

Join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/b8etRwv

name: Epic Run Crew: Wednesday Waddle
description:
You are halfway through the work week! Congratulations! Should you waddle to the finish line or push the pace a bit? You decide!

This is a 35 minute group run. You are welcome to run at your own pace (AYOP). Chatting is encouraged! Talk about food. Make a funny observation. Whatever. We don’t judge. Just have some fun!

Epic Run Crew is based in Vancouver, BC, Canada. We were founded as an in-person club in 2021 and then joined Zwift in June 2022.

Use the Zwift Companion app to join the Epic Run Crew club, for access to exclusive member-only group runs.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/epicruncrew2/
Instagram: @epicruncrew

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - ZG25 Climb Champs
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: Crit Cade Steering Race
description:
Steering Required: This event is designed to maximize the fun of Zwift Steering! If you have a steering device, now's the time to master those apexes and gain an advantage. If you do not have a steering device, unfortunately you will not be able to join.

Get ready for an electrifying dash under the lights in the Crit Cade Steering Racing Experience! This isn't your average crit—it's 8 laps of pure, high-octane racing Downtown Dolphin circuit, but with a thrilling arcade twist!

Power Up Pandemonium: This race features Power Ups! Strategically deploy your Boost Power ups to cut through the field. Timing is everything! Each Boost power up will give you a 10kph speed increase for 2 seconds!

Speed Boosts Galore: Keep your eyes peeled for additional Speed Boosts scattered across the course to give you that extra injection of pace when you need it most. But watch out because these boosts can move around, so you’ll need to be on top of your steering game!

Steering Required: This event is designed to maximize the fun of Zwift Steering! If you have a steering device, it’s the time to master those apexes and gain an advantage.

These events are held within our Zwift Labs club. This feature is still in development and we'd love your feedback on your experience.

description:
The Giant Hump Day Ride is two events in one, starting with a moderate effort of 2.6 – 3.0 w/kg. Use this time to warm-up, chat with fellow Zwifters, and maybe decide on a wheel or two you’re ready to get on.

Because this Giant ride gets spicy after the leader announces the start of the After Party: a 20-minute race. Be sure to listen to the ride leader’s instructions, before digging deep. Or not. If you want to keep it casual, it’s all good.

During the After Party the ride leader acts as a sweep, riding with the After Party cruisers, so everyone finishes together.

Complete the Giant Ride, and you’ll automatically unlock the awesome Giant kit! Join in the fun!

The BC Bike Race Endurance Workout is a weekly ride designed to help build your endurance during the winter months in preparation for the summer to shred singletrack.
For more information please visit bcbikerace.com

eventSubgroups.name: BC Bike Race Endurance Workout (D)
eventSubgroups.description:
Since 2007, athletes from 65 different countries have been racing the Ultimate Singletrack Adventure in British Columbia, Canada and now, BC Bike Race is bringing you a new experience to Zwift.
The BC Bike Race Endurance Workout is a weekly ride designed to help build your endurance during the winter months in preparation for the summer to shred singletrack.
For more information please visit bcbikerace.com

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: Hang with Hot Tubes Cycling
description: Come hang with the Hot Tubes Development Team (the winningest team in North America) on our weekly training ride, led by World Championship Junior Bronze Medalist Magnus Sheffield. We will ride at around 2.5-3.0W/kg, but will adjust this to the group as necessary. Please stay together as a group around the Beacon. It is a steady training ride, not a race. All are welcome - join us for as long as you want.

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: Hincapie Sportswear Power Hour
description: Sweet Spot Training. This workout focuses on (2) 15 minute "sweet spot" intervals, which are at 88-93% of your current FTP. These intervals train your body to resist fatigue during prolonged periods at a power output just below threshold. Over time, you want to move to longer intervals and more total time in zone. Rest intervals will be 5 minutes or less. Total Time in zone: 30 minutes.

name: VietVelo Weekly Social Ride
description: Come join the riders of VietVelo for our weekly social ride. This ride will alternate weeks between an easier social ride (2-2.5 w/kg) for the 1st, 3rd, and 5th Wednesdays to a harder tempo ride (2.5-3 w/kg) for the other weeks. This is a ride NOT a race. If you feel strong, stay in the front and pull. If you feel weak and are looking for a recovery ride, sit in the middle and chat away. Please add VietVelo to the end of your name so we know you are part of the ride. Visit us at vietvelo.org.

name: Good Time Riders - Pursuit Race
description:
Good Time Riders are a group of Zwifters from across the world who enjoy
riding, training and racing together. We race hard, encourage one another
to be their best, but enjoyment comes first. We have active teams at all
levels racing in Club Ladder, TTT, ZRL and DIRT series. We also run a
regular sub2 group ride for the Zwift community on Mondays, and a club
workout on Fridays. New members are always welcome, you can find us on the
Companion App, Facebook and Discord.

Enjoy the race!

name: Workout Wednesday Run
description:
Join the Zwift Runners for a group run workout that will be of benefit to all distance runners.

The speeds for each group are based on a threshold speed of A group 15 kph, B 13 kph, C 11 kph, D 9 kph. We will start the intervals at that speed but increase the speed of the intervals we get into the workout. We encourage runners to choose the group closest to the effort level you want to run at and to keep to the nominal speed for that group to maintain the group dynamic. However if these speeds are significantly too low or high for you then you can choose to run in the group that is closest and then adjust the target speed up to 10% up or down in the game or via the Companion app.

If you have any questions about this event or want to find out more about Zwift Running in general then please visit the Zwift Runners Facebook group or zwift.com/run #gozwiftrun #wow

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt19 RUN
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: Bikealicious 🐅 Tiger Wednesdays
description: We are a friendly gathering of cycling enthusiasts. We ride for 90 to 120 minutes but no less than 15 miles. You can ride 30 min, 60 min or up to 120min depending on the route. Bikealicious assigns new routes every Wednesday, to keep the workout fresh and fun for all the zwifters. We ride with a rubber band to motivate all skill sets to stay together through challenging routes, resulting in an interactive and dynamic workout. Our group includes riders of all power levels. We welcome all riders.

name: Betty Designs Group Workout
description:
A 90-minute workout with build sets of intervals both below + above your FTP. As the intervals get shorter, the effort gets harder!

About the workout designer: Betty Designs' - Kristin Mayer

Kristin is the founder/designer of Betty Designs. She has no formal coaching credentials, but has raced over 100 triathlons and now participates in endurance gravel events. In this workout she shares her favorite long interval workout that she uses in peak training for endurance events. Her goal is to stay ahead of the age curve and gain watts on the bike, even over 50.

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt20 BIKE
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: The Driveway Wednesday Worlds
description:
Let's make crits great again! 

Time to face the facts, sprinting is king when it comes to Zwift racing.  This 4-race multi-lap race rotation is designed to be fast and furious.  Use your power ups to plan a team breakaway.  Deploy a burrito for a solo attack.  Sit in the draft as long as you can before igniting your watt-bomb at the finish line. 

Whatever your tactic, practice it here to become a legendary Zwift racer!

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - ZG25 Climb Champs
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: Dutch Diesel Cycling Group Ride
description:
A group ride with a progressive increase in pace per lap. There’s a long lead in followed by 6 laps. The goal is to stay together and make optimal use of the draft. Together we ride faster!
Enjoy the build up and go hard in lap 5. Make sure to enjoy yourself and Drivk!
Lead-in and Lap 1 will Ride a a 2.0 W/kg. If you like to chat during the ride you can join our discord channel.

If you’d like to join the ride leader for a chat while riding, you can join our discord channel https://discord.gg/vUtZNsr.  For our complete ride schedule visit https://www.dutchdieselcycling.com/rideschedule

#ddc

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:

Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Volcano Circuit CCW
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt20 RUN
description: WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt21 BIKE
description:
WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

The series takes place every Wednesday year-round, allowing you to compete solo or for your club (or both!), with results and monthly leagues organized by age group, gender, and Zwift Club.

HOW DOES IT WORK?
You'll need to complete both the CYCLING and RUNNING events of the same option and complete at least 100m in each to record a score.

NO TREADMILL?
No problem! You can complete the run outside of Zwift. 
- Link your WTRL profile (www.wtrl.racing/profile/) to your Strava profile (Strava is free). 
- Sign-up for the Run Option through the Companion Zpp (but do not 'join the running event in-game). 
- Start and record your run on Strava within 5 minutes of finishing the bike ride, and we’ll handle the rest (your run score is usually processed within an hour).

FORMAT:
- 35 minutes of CYCLING 
- 7 minute 'Transition'
- 20 minutes of RUNNING

For full details, scoring, and registration, visit www.WTRL.racing/duathlon.

#wtrl #duathlon

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

eventSubgroups.name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro (A)
NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro (B)

name: USPFC PREPRIDES (United States Police and Fire Championship)
description: Hey everyone, welcome to the United States Police and Fire Championship PrepRides. Come and enjoy 60 minutes of good training and a bit of racing at the end of the ride as we gear up for the season! All are welcome!

eventSubgroups.name: USPFC PREPRIDES (United States Police and Fire Championship)

name: Zwift Beginners Weekly Group Workouts
description: Zwift Beginners is a welcoming place for all Zwift and cycling newbies looking to get in a group workout and find community! No pace is too slow, all questions are welcome and Ride Ons are given freely! These workouts will run Mondays and Wednesdays every 3 hours and be no more than 30 minutes (short and sweet). They are designed to give you a taste of what is possible on Zwift, nothing too hard or intimidating. All workouts are banded which means no matter what your level, we will all stick together! See you soon! Join the Zwift Beginner Club here https://www.zwift.com/.../b355516b-0136-45f8-ae6e.../join

eventSubgroups.name: Zwift Beginners Weekly Group Workouts (E)
eventSubgroups.description: What's your limit? It's time to expand it. The Expand workout runs you through a series of high-power surges that increase in length. This targets your ability to surge over and over and hold those efforts longer.

name: Crit Cade Steering Race
description:
Steering Required: This event is designed to maximize the fun of Zwift Steering! If you have a steering device, now's the time to master those apexes and gain an advantage. If you do not have a steering device, unfortunately you will not be able to join.

Get ready for an electrifying dash under the lights in the Crit Cade Steering Racing Experience! This isn't your average crit—it's 8 laps of pure, high-octane racing Downtown Dolphin circuit, but with a thrilling arcade twist!

Power Up Pandemonium: This race features Power Ups! Strategically deploy your Boost Power ups to cut through the field. Timing is everything! Each Boost power up will give you a 10kph speed increase for 2 seconds!

Speed Boosts Galore: Keep your eyes peeled for additional Speed Boosts scattered across the course to give you that extra injection of pace when you need it most. But watch out because these boosts can move around, so you’ll need to be on top of your steering game!

Steering Required: This event is designed to maximize the fun of Zwift Steering! If you have a steering device, it’s the time to master those apexes and gain an advantage.

These events are held within our Zwift Labs club. This feature is still in development and we'd love your feedback on your experience.

name: Stage 1 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 1
Route: Flat Out Fast
Date: March 16-22

The adventure kicks off on Flat Out Fast—where the name of the game is no hills and Big Spin prizes galore!

name: WTRL Duathlon Opt21 RUN
description:
WTRL's Duathlon League offers a unique and thrilling racing experience by combining biking on Zwift with the choice of running on Zwift or outside in real life. This makes it accessible to everyone and the ultimate test of racing versatility!

The series takes place every Wednesday year-round, allowing you to compete solo or for your club (or both!), with results and monthly leagues organized by age group, gender, and Zwift Club.

HOW DOES IT WORK?
You'll need to complete both the CYCLING and RUNNING events of the same option and complete at least 100m in each to record a score.

NO TREADMILL?
No problem! You can complete the run outside of Zwift. 
- Link your WTRL profile (www.wtrl.racing/profile/) to your Strava profile (Strava is free). 
- Sign-up for the Run Option through the Companion Zpp (but do not 'join the running event in-game). 
- Start and record your run on Strava within 5 minutes of finishing the bike ride, and we’ll handle the rest (your run score is usually processed within an hour).

FORMAT:
- 35 minutes of CYCLING 
- 7 minute 'Transition'
- 20 minutes of RUNNING

For full details, scoring, and registration, visit www.WTRL.racing/duathlon.

#wtrl #duathlon

name: Cycle Nation Nightcrawler Ride
description:
Are you a Zwifter looking for a steady, enjoyable late-night or early morning group ride to boost your endurance and aerobic fitness? Look no further than the Cycle Nation Nightcrawler Ride, designed specifically for riders who prefer a consistent pace at sub 1.8w/kg. Scheduled twice a week, this ride is perfect for those aiming to build their stamina and improve their overall fitness.

Our Nightcrawler Ride offers a relaxed, even-paced group ride environment where you can focus on being consistent about your training without the pressure of a race breaking out. A dedicated ride leader will be present to guide the pace, ensuring everyone stays together as a group. This ride is ideal as a warm-up, leading seamlessly into the slightly faster-paced Cycle Nation Joburg & Berlin Sunrise rides on Tuesday and Thursday mornings.

With a 10-minute gap between the rides, you'll have just enough time to refill your bottles and get ready for the next challenge. Join us for the Cycle Nation Nightcrawler Ride and make the most of your early morning or late-night rides! Perfect for anyone looking for a weekly early morning or late night group.

Connect with Cycle Nation:

• Visit our website: www.cyclenation.co.za
• Join our Facebook Group: https://bit.ly/38TTtAh
• Join our Zwift Team: https://bit.ly/3D2Q4zL
• Join our Strava Club: https://bit.ly/3pEDkFM
• Follow us on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3n4uhft
• Follow us on Instagram: https://bit.ly/3pEsdN6

name: The Zombie 5k
description:
Brought to you from the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) this event is called the Zombie Run as for those in the UK this event is in the middle of the night.

Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join, you can run at whatever pace you like, it's not a race.
If you don't want to run 5k then come along for as long as you wish, the support is always appreciated.
The event runs at the same time each day, Tuesday to Saturday and each day there is a different course.

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/

https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Follow Stuart on Strava - https://www.strava.com/athletes/2480515

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: Team Vitality Group Social Ride
description: This is a medium paced, fun ride at the bottom to middle of the C category. It is not a race, but there will be times we can have a go at the Sprints or KOM’s for bit of fun. The average speed for the ride is aprx 32kph and the average watts/kilo is 2.0 to 2.4 each week, although the nature of the courses can cause this to vary. We aim for a steady ride with moments for recovery after crunch moments.

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: Workout Wednesday Run
description:
Join the Zwift Runners for a group run workout that will be of benefit to all distance runners.

The speeds for each group are based on a threshold speed of A group 15 kph, B 13 kph, C 11 kph, D 9 kph. We will start the intervals at that speed but increase the speed of the intervals we get into the workout. We encourage runners to choose the group closest to the effort level you want to run at and to keep to the nominal speed for that group to maintain the group dynamic. However if these speeds are significantly too low or high for you then you can choose to run in the group that is closest and then adjust the target speed up to 10% up or down in the game or via the Companion app.

If you have any questions about this event or want to find out more about Zwift Running in general then please visit the Zwift Runners Facebook group or zwift.com/run #gozwiftrun #wow

name: Power Loop
description:
Power Loop”, designed to enhance muscular endurance, cadence control, and
mental resilience. The session is FTP-based and includes motivational cues,
recovery phases, and a final push, making it ideal for riders looking to build
strength and rhythm indoors. 



A circuit of strength and control designed to push your limits and build resilience.




Perfect for developing muscular endurance, rhythm control, and mental toughness. Every loop prepares you for tougher challenges ahead—inside or on the road.



Interval Breakdown:



1. Warm-Up – 10 minutes



3 min in Z1 @ 90 RPM
3 min in Z2 @ 95 RPM
4 min in Z2 @ 100 RPM


2. Main Set – 4 Repeats of This Block (24 minutes total)



Each loop is a mix of tempo, threshold, and VO2 max work with controlled cadence variation:



2 min in Z3 @ 95 RPM — steady sub-threshold push
1 min in Z4 @ 85 RPM — near threshold, slower cadence
1 min in Z5 @ 75 RPM — VO2 max effort, low cadence strength
2 min in Z3 @ 90 RPM — flush with tempo effort
1 min in Z4 @ 100 RPM — FTP effort with fast legs
2 min in Z2 @ 85 RPM — recovery at sweet spot


3. Active Recovery – 5 minutes

5 min in Z1 @ 90 RPM


4. Final Push – 4 minutes

2 min in Z4 @ 90 RPM
2 min in Z5 @ 100 RPM


5. Cool Down – 5 minutes

5 min in Z1 @ 85 RPM

name: Vikings Valhalla Fatburn Ride
description:
Come and join the Vikings team for some morning fat burning. The aim for this ride is to keep your heart rate and power profile in zone 1 and 2. We encourage all to come fasted for an even better effect. Are you an early morning European zwifter and looking to ride in a fasted state at a pace that works for all, then look no further. If you are from other parts of the world and looking for a short recovery ride, then this will also work perfectly.

For more information about our rides go to: https://www.facebook.com/groups/503388660165279/

name: WTRL Team Time Trial - Zone 1
description:
WTRL Team Time Trial #365

Our weekly WTRL Team Time Trial (TTT) allows teams of 3-8 Zwifters to race against the clock together throughout the day to achieve the fastest possible times. Teams are arranged into WTRL's unique Coffee Classes and feature both women's only Coffee Classes and mixed gender too.
  
 There are 30 racing events and teams can be registered up 30 minutes before each race event starts at www.wtrl.racing/ttt-home/ and you can pick your start time from the available slots. Each team is issued a unique RacePass that must be clicked by each team member to gain access to the event for sign-up. You'll also be able to check out the rules, course records and results which update live throughout the day.
  
 Teams & Riders must be registered with www.WTRL.racing and you'll need to be sharing data, via your Zwift Profile Connections with www.zwiftpower.com.
  
 If you are looking for a team, head to our dedicated WTRL TTT Facebook page where plenty of teams are always happy to welcome guest riders and new team mates (https://www.facebook.com/groups/WTRLTTT). Not on Facebook? Feel free to drop us an email with your preferred WTRL TTT Zone and current Zwift Category 
  
 #wtrl #wtrlttt

name: ZLDR Misty Mornings
description:
Start your day with the serene beauty of Scotland’s iconic misty Loch, all from the comfort of your home. Join us for a peaceful yet invigorating run around the Loch Loop. As the sun rises over the misty waters, feel the calm energy of Scotland’s landscape propel you forward, whether you’re chasing a personal best or simply enjoying the virtual scenery. It’s the perfect way to embrace the early morning and set the tone for a day full of possibilities!

Facebook group:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZLDR2020

Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/zldr.2020/

Strava:
https://www.strava.com/clubs/zldr2020

Discord Invitation (not required for the run)
https://discord.com/invite/PuFctEnWyn

name: Cycle Nation Warsaw Wake Up Call
description:
Welcome to the Cycle Nation Warsaw Wake Up Call. Join us for a scientifically engineered PPP (Propel Progrssive Pace) session. We start with an easy warm-up pace and gradually increase power throughout the ride. In the last 10 minutes we activate three short intervals to really wake up your day! All riders are welcome to join the event and enjoy the friendly atmosphere. Please follow the ride leaders instructions and try group around the beacon. Most importantly this isn't a race and we ask that you respect the pace set by the ride leader which will allow for an enjoyable group ride experience for all.

Join our Facebook Group: https://bit.ly/38TTtAh
Join our Zwift Team: https://bit.ly/3D2Q4zL
Join our Strava Club: https://bit.ly/3pEDkFM
Instagram: https://bit.ly/3pEsdN6

name: EVO CC Vortex Interval Ride [~3-3.8w/kg avg]
description:
Welcome to the Evolution Cycling Club [EVO] interval session. These rides are geared towards Zwifters that are looking for a varied content one hour session that can give them a full 5 zone workout. Draft in the group and stay zone 1-3, or move to the front and join the sprints for zones 4 and 5 for short bursts. Average for this ride will be mid to high Category B but it may vary based upon course/leader. There will be keepers at the back, and they will try hard to save dropped riders. The group is based upon high social interaction so bring your best banter. Use the mobile app or a keyboard to communicate in-ride.

#evo

name: INC Relentless Intervals
description:
Suitable for A riders as a base session, or B & C riders wanting to push themselves.

Examples of the drills are – Z2 with 15sec Z5/6 bursts every 6minutes, alternating Z2/Z3 in various durations, Z2 - Z4 ramps of decreasing duration and many other sessions.

All sessions will be around 60-90mins and will include a warm up so just grab your bottles and head straight to the pen.

This is an Innovation Cycling Training Ride Event – all riders are welcome. These events are put together to push you further than before, if you are feeling fresh hop on the front, if you need rest surf the draft. This training ride is part of the INC RELENTLESS training rides that happen daily with each day focusing on a different area of improvement.

Tips: Use the draft to rest and ensure you do not lose the draft.

name: EVO CC Flux Ride [1.8 - 2.0w/kg avg]
description:
This is a Evolution Cycling Club [EVO] Social Event and ride for all. Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that all riders respect the pace set by the leader (Yellow Beacon). We may include intervals over and below the ride average advertised power range, but we will allow enough recovery and time to regroup after every effort. This is not a race, so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong we would welcome any help offered by stronger riders to bring any dropped riders back to the yellow beacon. We welcome good chat and a social atmosphere for new and experienced Zwifters alike, everyone is welcome.

#evo

name: SZR Early Birdies
description:
Welcome to SZR Early Birdies

This is a group ride with the focus on remaining together. The average pace PRIOR to any race finish will be 2.2 wkg. Sprints and intervals will be added at the discretion of the leader and we will at time ride above and below the advertised pace!

Please regroup quickly after sprints, intervals or hills and sit between the yellow and red beacons.
This ride will particularly benefit D and lower C riders looking to get stronger.

#SZR

name: 3R Octane Interval Ride [~3.2-3.6 w/kg avg]
description:
This is a 3R Group Ride Event. 3R Octane runs five days a week and is designed to provide a solid and fun training platform for riders.

Different ride leaders target different effort levels and courses, with power averages in the range 3.2-3.8 W/kg.

The wide spread reflects the diversity of rides, including weekly recovery, or transitional, rides which are usually on a Monday. Short, high intensity intervals, longer sweetspot intervals, flying laps, long and short climbs and exploring little used routes all feature.

The rides are typically around an hour long, but some can be up to two hours long, and all end with a mini race.

The Group welcomes rider interaction through messaging and the Octane discord server and features a super bunch of regulars to which newcomers, and riders stepping up from lower intensity rides, are always welcome. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/

#Team3R #Ride3R #RideRaceRaise #3r

name: 3R VOLT Interval Ride [~2.6-3.2 w/kg avg]
description:
This is a 3R Group Ride so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong, please help the keeper beacon (Red) to assist other riders back to the pack. 3R VOLT runs five days a week and is designed to provide a solid and fun training platform for riders.

Different ride leaders target different effort levels and courses, with power averages in the range 2.8-3.2 w/kg.

The wide spread reflects the diversity of rides and training needs, the following is a typical week:
Monday – After what has hopefully been a fun backed weekend on the bike, this our recovery session
Tuesday – Tends to be more of a classic interval session, riders usually finish with an average of around 3.0w/kg
Wednesday – We take to the hills and one of our tougher sessions with riders averaging around 3.2w/kg
Thursday – is our no red beacon ride and again tough interval sets and riders finishing around 3.2w/kg
Friday - is a little different, we don't take ourselves too seriously and often play a variety of games and quizzes along side the intervals and riders end up with around 2.8-3.0w/kg

The rides are typically around an hour long, but some may take up to 75mins with the majority finishing with either a ramp or a mini race.

The group welcomes rider interaction through messaging and the VOLT discord server and features a friendly bunch of regulars to which newcomers, and riders stepping up from lower intensity rides, are always welcome. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/

This group ride is not a race so. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/ #Team3R #Ride3R #RideRaceRaise.

name: 3R SPARK Interval Ride [~2.2-2.5 w/kg avg]
description: This is a 3R Group Ride Event (not a race). 3R Spark runs five days a week and is designed to be an accessible and sociable training session, aimed primarily at riders is Cat-D. Different ride leaders target different effort levels and courses, with power averages in the range 2.0-2.5 W/kg. The wide spread reflects the diversity of rides. Mondays and Tuesdays are our entry-level steady-state rides, where we aim to hold a steady 2.0-2.2 throughout. Wednesdays are a steady recovery ride, where we split into two different ability groups. Thursdays and Fridays are our interval sessions, designed to help Cat D riders push themselves a little further. For interval sessions we aim to average between 2.2-2.5 for the session, but there will be times above and below. Thursday and Friday sessions often include an optional mini-race at the end. Rides are typically around an hour long. Spark is a great introduction to group rides on Zwift, we are a friendly and supportive group who love to see one another succeed. We always have a sweeper (red beacon) whose wheel you can grab if you get dropped. There’s always plenty of good chat, via in-ride messages or on Discord. Come and join us! Join the 3R Facebook group for more info: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/ #Team3R #3R #RideRaceRaise

name: WTRL Team Time Trial - Zone 3
description:
WTRL Team Time Trial #365

Our weekly WTRL Team Time Trial (TTT) allows teams of 3-8 Zwifters to race against the clock together throughout the day to achieve the fastest possible times. Teams are arranged into WTRL's unique Coffee Classes and feature both women's only Coffee Classes and mixed gender too.
  
 There are 30 racing events and teams can be registered up 30 minutes before each race event starts at www.wtrl.racing/ttt-home/ and you can pick your start time from the available slots. Each team is issued a unique RacePass that must be clicked by each team member to gain access to the event for sign-up. You'll also be able to check out the rules, course records and results which update live throughout the day.
  
 Teams & Riders must be registered with www.WTRL.racing and you'll need to be sharing data, via your Zwift Profile Connections with www.zwiftpower.com.
  
 If you are looking for a team, head to our dedicated WTRL TTT Facebook page where plenty of teams are always happy to welcome guest riders and new team mates (https://www.facebook.com/groups/WTRLTTT). Not on Facebook? Feel free to drop us an email with your preferred WTRL TTT Zone and current Zwift Category 
  
 #wtrl #wtrlttt

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: GXY SURGE [1.6-2.5wkg] – CAT D
description:
Welcome to GXY Surge!
 
Different ride leaders will target varying effort levels each day, yet still bring you home well within the advertised power!
 
The ride is looking to push Cat Ds and low Cat Cs that little further all within a manageable 50 minute ride.  Please respect the leader’s pace and watch your fitness develop!
 
GXY are a friendly and supportive club who strive to help others succeed.  We are looking forward to riding with you.
 
If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally via our Facebook link or by the email below:

eventSubgroups.description:
This is a GXY CC group ride (not a race). GXY Solar Surge is designed to be a sociable training session so come
warmed up ready to work! 

Different ride leaders will target varying effort levels taking riders through ramps, pyramids, sprints and sweet spot training with an occasional recovery ride thrown in forbalance.

The ride is aimed at pushing CAT D and low CAT C riders that little bit further all within a 50 min workout.
We recover EASY and we work HARD! Respect the leader’s pace which will change subject to the
workload, follow the session, work as a team together and watch your fitness develop.

GXY CC are a friendly and supportive team who strive to help others succeed.

Discover more about GXY CC by visiting https://www.Facebook.com/groups/galaxycyclingclub/

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: Micro Mountain Massif Race 2 - s/b Elite
description:
This event is designed so you can go "full throttle" on a climb for a very short period of time and to push yourself beyond your perceived limits, going shoulder to shoulder with fellow racers.

To win, you may require to employ tactics. Do you save energy on the flat section before going hard on the climb? Do you opt to go hard from the start? Only you can decide and the decision you make will impact your results.

If you are not interested in racing for the victory, treat this event as a test of your 5-minute power. Generate a consistently high power for 5 minutes and boost your ratings in Zwift Power. This race is unique and offers something for all.

Rules: 
Heart Rate monitor required and Zwift Power for official results, winner of each category.

More information:
For more information check out the Mountain Massif website www.mountainmassif.com, follow on Instagram, Mountain_Massif and join our Zwift Club, by clicking the link below
https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b639575d-930f-4de6-a79d-bea3313350bc/join

name: Endure IQ Training Squad Session
description:
SESSION FOCUS:
The focus of this session is to spend as much time as possible at and above
~90% of your VO2max. The priority is on maintaining high power/pace during the
work intervals. These sessions are highly stressful but great for generating
adaptations that will improve your oxygen-carrying capacity and therefore top-
end aerobic capacity. For long-distance triathletes, these sessions can also
serve as an effective precursor to longer interval sessions.

﻿WARM-UP :
Progressive for 20 min
PREP SET:
5 x 15 sec at L4/45 sec at L2
2 min Recovery
MAIN SET:
Sets of 30 sec reps at L5, 15 sec at L1 recovery (3 min recovery between
sets)﻿
COOLDOWN:
10 min

name: ZLDR Easy 30
description:
Join Zwift Long-Distance Runners (ZLDR) run club for a relaxed 30 minute run. Whether you want to use this time to walk just to get your blood flowing or push for a new personal best or anything in between, this is a great session to join! Even if you can’t join for 30 minutes, come for whatever you have available. We are a flexible group of walkers/runners who want to help you get consistent and get results.

ZLDR is a group of diverse people, from speed demons to walkers, from people just getting to their first 5k to ultra runners. We are here to support your running dreams and help you develop your running skills. We are a collective group of supportive and experienced runners and walkers who want to help you set and achieve new goals!

For more ZLDR fun and support, join our groups on social media platforms:

The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. name: Bikealicious Rubberband Joy Ride
description:
This is a social ride welcoming all riders. Our mission is to push you further than before, build your endurance, and have fun. If you are feeling strong, push to the front and drag the group, if not, just sit in the peloton.

We have the “rubber-band” activated, which means that it’s a no drop ride - no matter what level you are, you will be able to keep up, and the group WILL STAY TOGETHER. Note: The overall speed may be lower than in other rides due to the banding effect.

So hop on that bike, grab those bottles, and let’s ride!

name: MAAP In The Field: UK Group Ride
description:
MAAP In The Field: UK Group Ride

Join the MAAP crew each week, we’ll roll as a group at a moderate 2-2.5 w/kg pace. The course varies each week, with a range of undulating routes. Join our global community for a social ride and unlock the exclusive MAAP kit. Jump on the chat, ask us any questions you might have and remember that this isn’t a race, save that for Wednesdays!


How do I unlock the Off The MAAP Kit?


Not only will you be repping the kit in-event, but finish any of our weekly rides to unlock the Off The MAAP Kit in your garage, so you can proudly wear the M-Flag design on any ride.

About MAAP:

MAAP exists for the progression of cycling. An independent brand, we’re committed to bringing a new perspective on performance cycling apparel. Every piece that we design evokes our obsession with quality, function, and precision. Fabrics are hand-selected from premier Swiss and Italian mills and are constructed at the most respected factories across Europe. Using the feedback and support from racing teams and cyclists around the globe, our industry-leading product developers are relentlessly refining and evolving every product, season after season. Visit: maap.cc

Stay up to date with the latest MAAP In The Field rides, product launches, cycling events and see who’s topping the leaderboards each week. Connect with the global MAAP community by joining our MAAP Strava Club: https://www.strava.com/clubs/293623 for a global epic from our In the Field series, stay posted on our Facebook page: http://facebook.com/maap.cc or fill your feed via: https://www.instagram.com/maap.cc/.

name: SZR Sunrise Ride
description:
Welcome to SZR Sunrise

C and D  Ride
Tempo ride with optional sprint sections. Non sprinters will work as a group to create as much draft as we can for the sprinters.
Sprints will be added at the discretion of the leader.
We will at times ride above and below the advertised pace, please don’t feel the need to tell the leader they will be aware but the ride average will be as advertised.
This is NOT a recovery ride, we work hard and work as a team.

E Ride
The focus is on the Group and keeping together while having fun to make the time fly fast!
The ride tempo is shown next to the ride category, this is rider weight / gender dependant.
Note that the average is for the ride prior to any optional faster finish (with a beacon).
The ride leader will aim (prior to any faster finish) to ride mid parameters after a short warmup period.
There might be slight variations above or below the average during the ride.


NB:
Please always respect the ride leader and follow his / her instructions.
The ride tempo is shown next to the ride category, this is rider weight / gender dependant.

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: Kiwi Crew Ride
description:
Established in 2018 by former NZ Tour Pro Greg Henderson this Kiwi group ride is now a classic! Our community continues to grow with some of NZ's best E-Sports racers taking to the line each week.

The ride starts off at a moderate 2.5 w/kg average where there’s time for a bit of banter or to spin a good yarn so stay close as you don't want to miss out on the fun! But rachet up the shoes because at the 30 minute mark things get spicy with the Riot After Party! Race to the finish and see how long you can hang on or if you can take on some of the best!

Will you be this weeks Riot winner?

Please respect the ride and stay with the ride leader (yellow beacon) until the Riot hits with around 15 mins remaining, at that point you can race the riot to the finish, or cruise to the finish. Everyone is welcome to join.

* Everyone with a Power Meter and / or Smart Trainer is welcome to join.
* Use of the Coffee Stop during the Riot will incur a 1 min time penalty.
* New cadence rules in play.
* Winners subject to verification requests.

#kiwicrew

name: Stage 1 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 1
Route: Flat Out Fast
Date: March 16-22

The adventure kicks off on Flat Out Fast—where the name of the game is no hills and Big Spin prizes galore!

name: La sortie solidaire des bonnets bleus
description:
Le mode élastique favorise la cohésion au sein du groupe, permettant à chacun d’exprimer pleinement ses compétences. Ainsi, les défis ne deviennent plus des obstacles, mais plutôt des occasions de partage convivial et de plaisir collectif, transformant l’effort en une expérience enrichissante.

Discutez sur Discord /  Discuss on Discord: https://discord.gg/HgFb6SThT
Notre Facebook: https://m.facebook.com/groups/907351331715445

"Please add “(Gang)” at the end of your username in your Zwift profile.   Merci de mettre (Gang) à la fin de votre pseudo dans votre profil zwift 
"
Ruberband mode encourages group cohesion, allowing everyone to fully express their abilities.      Challenges are no longer obstacles, but opportunities for friendly sharing and collective enjoyment, turning effort into a truly rewarding experience.

eventSubgroups.name: La sortie solidaire des bonnets bleus (E)

name: WTRL Team Time Trial - Zone 5
description:
WTRL Team Time Trial #365

Our weekly WTRL Team Time Trial (TTT) allows teams of 3-8 Zwifters to race against the clock together throughout the day to achieve the fastest possible times. Teams are arranged into WTRL's unique Coffee Classes and feature both women's only Coffee Classes and mixed gender too.
  
 There are 30 racing events and teams can be registered up 30 minutes before each race event starts at www.wtrl.racing/ttt-home/ and you can pick your start time from the available slots. Each team is issued a unique RacePass that must be clicked by each team member to gain access to the event for sign-up. You'll also be able to check out the rules, course records and results which update live throughout the day.
  
 Teams & Riders must be registered with www.WTRL.racing and you'll need to be sharing data, via your Zwift Profile Connections with www.zwiftpower.com.
  
 If you are looking for a team, head to our dedicated WTRL TTT Facebook page where plenty of teams are always happy to welcome guest riders and new team mates (https://www.facebook.com/groups/WTRLTTT). Not on Facebook? Feel free to drop us an email with your preferred WTRL TTT Zone and current Zwift Category 
  
 #wtrl #wtrlttt

name: PACK Run: Social
description:
PACK is well known for being one of the best social group rides on Zwift. But did you know that some Packers also like to...run?! That's right! You can now join your favorite group as we put down our bikes and pick up our running shoes.

The PACK social run is a 30 minute, relaxed pace 5k with several pace groups to fit your needs. Please choose the pace group you are most likely to stick with. This is NOT a race.

All runners are welcome to join the event and enjoy the friendly supportive atmosphere.

Facebook Group: #zwiftpack
https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftpack/

Discord Voice Chat:
https://discord.gg/cce7ers

#pack

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: Elastic Long Ride
description:
Soyez les bienvenu(e)s dans le ride du club BIKES (tag : BIKES)
But : le mode elastic permet de rester ensemble quelque soit les watts développés. Les plus faibles sont assurés de rester avec notre leader !
Rythme du leader 1.5 w/kg
Durée 1h30
Ce n’est pas une course.
Rejoins-nous ! ajoute le tag BIKES à ton pseudo Zwift et rejoins le club BIKES FRANCE
sur Companion

Discutez sur Discord: https://discord.gg/a8wYvgw
Notre Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZwiftBikes
Rejoignez-nous : https://www.bikesfrance.com/


Welcome to the BIKES club ride (tag: BIKES)

JOIN OUR NEW CLUB for non-french riders on Companion : club BIKES WORLD,
English spoken !
The idea is to bring together riders from all over the world, no matter where you come from, no matter your level, no matter if you are already in a club or not ; just have fun !

GOAL: Elastic mode allows everyone to stay together regardless of the watts generated. The weakest riders are guaranteed to stay with the leader!

Leader's pace: 1.5 w/kg
Duration 1h30
This is not a race.

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - ZG25 Climb Champs
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

Zwift TT Club Racing - ZG25 Climb Champs (B)
Zwift TT Club Racing - ZG25 Climb Champs (C)
Zwift TT Club Racing - ZG25 Climb Champs (D)

name: Team Italy Spicy Coffee Italian Ride
description:
Se cerchi la giusta compagnia per prepararti al fine settimana sei nel posto giusto.
Lo scopo della SPICY COFFEE ITALIAN RIDE è quello di stare tutti insieme, sfruttare la scia del gruppo e fare due chiacchiere ad un ritmo medio fra i 2.0 e i 2.5 w/kg per 90 minuti, il late join è attivo per 30 minuti.
Questa NON è una gara.
Segui le istruzioni dei leader(giallo) per un gruppo compatto.
Ricordati di non superare la fence (barra rossa) altrimenti verrai eliminato.
Partecipa a questa ride per sbloccare la divisa del team italy.
BUONA PEDALATA A TUTTI
TEAM ITALY organizza una vasta gamma di eventi, tutti con le seguenti regole:
-in una pedalata di categoria D, alcuni ciclisti sono principianti, segui le istruzioni del
leader (logo giallo) che appaiono come testo al centro e tieni presente che il ritmo sarà fra i 2.0 e i 2.5 w/kg
-Il valore w/kg sarà diverso per tutti voi, il motivo principale sarà il peso, seguito dalla
capacità di utilizzare la scia e l'equipaggiamento della vostra bici in gioco
-abilitare i messaggi nelle opzioni zwift, fondamentali per una buona esperienza
-le pedalate della categoria D sono facili per un ciclista con C alto, 3w/kg ftp, impegnative per un C basso, 2.5 w/kg ftp, estreme per un ciclista D con 2 w/kg FTP, lo stesso per le
corse C, facili per un A, 4w/kg ftp, impegnative per B 3.2 w/kg ftp, ed estreme per C con 2.5
w/kg ftp.


Are you looking for the perfect companion and you are training for the weekend? This is the right place.
Spicy Coffee Italian Ride's goal is to stay together, enjoy the group draft, and have a bit of easy chat at an average pace between 2.0 and 2.5 w/kg for 90 minutes, late join is enabled for 30 minutes.
This is NOT A RACE.


Follow the leaders' instructions (yellow beacons) to keep the group tight.
Remember the Fence is KILLER, 60 seconds over and you'll be out of the event.
Join this ride to unlock the Team Italy Jersey.
TEAM ITALY organizes a wide range of events, which all agree to the following rules:
- in a D category ride, some riders are beginners, and follow the leader's instructions (yellow
beacon) that appear as text in the middle and keep in mind that the pace will be between 2.0 and 2.5 w/kg


-The w/kg value will be different for all of you, the main reason will be weight, followed by the
capacity to use the draft and your in-game bike equipment
- enable the messages in Zwift options, fundamental for a great experience
- D category's rides are easy for a high C rider, 3wkg ftp, challenging for a low C, 2.5 w/kg
FTP, is extreme for a D rider with 2 w/kg FTP, same for C rides, easy for an A, 4 w/kg ftp,
challenging for B's, 3.2 w/kg ftp, and extreme for C's 2.5 w/kg ftp.
- if you have any suggestions please let us know


#TeamItaly #JerseyUnlock #respect4leader

name: TEZH Racing | Endurance Ride
description:
Únete a nuestra ruta de fondo de los Jueves. No es una carrera, o si... Sea como sea, si quieres poner un ritmo alto, seguro que alguien te perseguirá, pero si prefieres ir charlando y tranquilo, entra en nuestro canal de Discord y pasa una buena mañana en compañía.

- Nuevas rutas todos los Jueves.

Únete al equipo en ZwiftPower 👇
https://zwiftpower.com/team.php?id=20380

name: PAOLO BARBERA & SCANNELLATORI SERIALI WORKOUT
description:
"Scannellatori Seriali" is a large community of cyclists, triathletes, and runners. We invite you to join our community by following our Instagram page at https://www.instagram.com/scannellatori_seriali/ or contacting us on Facebook.
 
Coach Paolo Barbera (Please visit www.heycoach.it )   is a Certified Triathlon and Ironman Coach and the founder of Active Kids, a sporting clinic to help children and adults in the prevention and treatment of obesity through healty nutrition and tailored training programs

Paolo is an experienced thriathlete and cyclist, in 2017 opened an endurance training center in milan, Tri60, specilized in indoor training.

In the last ten years Paolo has developed training programs for triathletes, runners and cyclists. Indoor training plays a key role to control pace, cadence and mental strenght.

Paolo’s workouts are designed to mix different training zones aiming to maximize results in a very short time. Paolo’s coachees by following his workouts, at the right intensity, have achieved challenging results.

name: Stage 2 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 2
Route: Mayan San Remo
Date: March 23-29

Keep the prize wheels and bike wheels spinning as we move it over to Mayan San Remo for Stage 2.

name: WKG 2for1 DOWN UNDER
description:
Get ready for a full-throttle 60-minute group ride that’s guaranteed to deliver big fun and even bigger watts!
The YELLOW BEACON will be rolling at a punchy 2.0 w/kg average — perfect pace for chatting, laughing, and smashing it together. Expect a friendly sprint competition mid-ride to get the legs firing… and of course, the one and only WORLD FAMOUS WKG MINI-RACE FINISH where we crown the legends at the line! 🏆
Pro tips for maximum fun:
• Stick with the Yellow Beacon for the full group-ride magic
• Dad jokes are not just allowed — they’re highly encouraged 😂
• Finish the ride and unlock the seriously awesome WKG One11 jersey as your reward!
Dropped off the back? No stress! Just shout for help and our legendary RED BEACON CREW will swing back, pick you up, and get you straight back into the action — as long as you’re putting in the effort with them.
This is going to be an absolute blast. See you Down Under — let’s make this one unforgettable! 🇦🇺

eventSubgroups.name: WKG 2for1 DOWN UNDER (D)
eventSubgroups.description:
WKG 2for1 DOWN UNDER will be a 60min group ride, the YELLOW BEACON pace will average 2wkg. There will be a friendly sprint competition and of course the WORLD FAMOUS WKG MINI-RACE FINISH.

Please ride with the beacon for the best group ride experience, Dad Jokes are welcomed and completing this ride unlocks this awesome WKG One11 jersey .......

If you find yourself off the back please ask for assistance......our awesome RED BEACON CREW, will help you get back to the group, providing you make the effort with them.

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Volcano Circuit CCW
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.
