name: AP Racing | And you thought work was stressful!
description:
Ever wanted to know what it is like to train like a Pro? Well now you can!  These workouts are designed for Andy Potts and his racing team!   These are set for all skill levels and are ""no drop"" so as long as you are pedaling, you are with the group! We can't promise you will get to a podium but Andy does have over 30 Half Distance Tri's so it couldn't hurt!

Raise the Floor
Build Aerobic Engine and 'push up' FTP by working in z2/z3. Build ability to recover in z2- 'raise floor'

eventSubgroups.name: AP Racing | And you thought work was stressful! (E)

name: Stage 4 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 4
Route: Sand and Sequoias
Date: April 6-12

Wrap up the Zwift Big Spin down on Sand and Sequoias, with loads of prizes still on deck!

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Volcano Circuit CCW
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: SWX Thursday Threshold by Coach Cindy 🇬🇧 🇳🇱 🇦🇪
description:
Push your limits every Thursday with SWX Threshold — a focused effort session built to improve your FTP and race performance.
Designed by Coach Cindy (Train Smart = Race Stronger), this session targets sustained high-intensity intervals just below or at threshold. It’s not easy, but it works. Bring your grit, legs, and a full bottle.

• All levels welcome
• Stay-together mode enabled
• Late join allowed

Connect and learn more about who we are:
📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/shark_worx_swx
🌐 Website: https://bit.ly/Visit_Coach_Cindy

eventSubgroups.name: SWX Thursday Threshold by Coach Cindy 🇬🇧 🇳🇱 🇦🇪 (E)

name: Cycle Nation Banded Cakewalk
description:
Welcome to the Cycle Nation Banded Cakewalk. Everyone is welcome to join us for a fun social ride and to complete route badges whilst enjoying our well-stocked dessert trolley. Black Forest Gateaux anyone? This is a banded ride, where everyone stays together as long as they are pedalling		
Join our Facebook Group: https://bit.ly/38TTtAh		
Join our Zwift Team: https://bit.ly/3D2Q4zL		
Join our Strava Club: https://bit.ly/3pEDkFM		
Instagram: https://bit.ly/3pEsdN6

name: GXY HIGH STRATOSPHERE [2.3-2.7wkg] – CAT C
description:
Welcome to GXY High Stratosphere!
This ride is looking to help you to develop towards Category C and we call it our High Stratosphere (Cat C) group ride.

We will achieve this together by providing a consistent pace to help you build both your strength and stamina at the lower end of the Cat C range of power.

The ride leader and the team will bring you back down to Earth on 60 minutes whilst remaining within the advertised power range! (expect an approximate 2.5wkg ride average depending on body size and course selection) The event is designed to push Cat D's even further towards the next power category. Please respect the leader’s pace and watch your fitness develop!

GXY are a friendly and supportive club who strive to help others succeed their goals.

Our Club emphasis is based on inclusivity, diversity, respect and providing fun at all levels on Zwift whether riding socially, racing your legs off or hanging around our optional chat groups waiting for our IRL meet ups!

We are of course looking forward to riding with you.

If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally via our Facebook link:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/galaxycyclingclub/
https://www.strava.com/clubs/989894
https://www.instagram.com/galaxycyclingclub

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

eventSubgroups.name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro (A)
NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro (B)

name: Team Italy Run For Fun
description:
Welcome Runners to our Team Italy Run For Fun, You can run at your own pace but We'll run as one in this great event promoted by the Running Division of Team Italy.
You can find more information about us on Facebook Zwift Running Italy, on Telegram as Team Italy.
#TeamItaly #Run

name: Zwift Women's Training Club Workout
description:
Welcome to the Zwift Women’s Training Club workouts! 

ZWTC is your community for fun and fitness. Our weekly workouts will take you through some of Zwift’s most popular training plans, and with the flexibility to join in any time, regardless of where we are in the plan! Get the most out of your Zwifting with training designed by world-class coaches, like 3x Olympic Gold medalist, Kristin Armstrong!

The group workouts will be held every 3 hours UTC on Tuesdays and Thursdays. We’ll also offer recovery rides every 3 hours on Wednesdays - be on the look out for special guests joining those! Our main goal is to provide you with a consistent experience week in and week out, to challenge yourself in a supportive group setting, making friends and getting fit along the way! 

Join the Zwift Women’s Training Club to connect with new ride friends, ask questions, and get advice from experts.  https://www.zwift.com/clubs/ZwiftWTC/join

Love these workouts? Check out the club for more opportunities to train with us! We offer social rides every 3 hours on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays in addition to the Tuesday/Thursday workouts.

name: MoTTIV Ride with Triathlon Taren
description:
Come for a fun, short, and challenging ride! You'll ride with Triathlon Taren and people who join from all around the world to get through workouts together and try to have fun throughout.

#tritaren

name: Group Run 10k
description:
Join us for a 10k group run.   It's run-at-your-own-pace and all are welcome! 

Pick the closest pace group for you, but all groups will start together and you are free to fall back and run ahead. The pace groups designate average pace for the duration of the run. Most groups will start slower and finish faster than the indicated pace. Feel free to mix in some intervals and race your friends. #pbt

name: Stanga Racing Punchy Thursdays
description:
Stanga Racing Punchy Thursdays is your weekly dose of short climbs, sharp surges, and leg-burning repeats. Expect a fast rolling course with plenty of chances to attack, close gaps, and test your VO2.
Pick the right category, race fair, and bring your best punch – this one is designed to hurt, not to last all night.

Like this format? Join the Stanga Racing club on Zwift for our full weekly schedule of crits, punchy races, and endurance rides.

https://www.zwift.com/clubs/12f0e125-1fb8-4d78-8da2-b39efca4bffb/home

name: Applewood Cycling Group Ride
description:
Established in September 2020, The Applewood Cycling Group Ride is surely one of the longest continually running weekly group rides on Zwift. Join leader Stephen Collins for a challenging B+ tempo training ride in the lavender fields of France covering two full laps of the Douce route. Our ride incorporates both a steady group with the leader targeting pulls on the front at 3.5 to 3.9 WKG (drafting average ~3.2wkg), and we offer an all-out A+ pace breakaway group. Our breakaway is fully sanctioned and an important element of our group ride dynamic. Every now and then the beacon group catches the break, but only very rarely. No fence, proud. No sweep. We do honor the finish line with a competitive sprint!

We encourage friendly group banter during the ride. Our goal is to create an outstanding training ride that is social and entertaining. Thanks to all our wonderful regulars and a big welcome to all newcomers.

name: Team DRAFT Thursday Race
description:
Welcome to the Thursday Race brought to you by Team DRAFT!
We encourage that all participants head over to zwiftpower.com and register. For more information see: https://zwiftinsider.com/zwiftpower-signup/ Riders who have not completed the Zwiftpower registration will not be included in the official race results. We also ask that your Zwift activities be saved publicly, and that you open and maintain a Strava account to allow for organizer analysis. Any rider exhibiting questionable performance during a the race may be disqualified.

RULES:
- No zPower riders.
- Heart rate monitors mandatory for all categories
- 5min and 20min CEVAZ limits apply. Riding in the wrong category will lead to disqualification.

RACE CATEGORIES:
A: 4.0 W/kg to 5.0 W/kg
B: 3.2 W/kg to 3.99 W/kg
C: 2.5 W/kg to 3.19 W/kg
D: Under 2.49 W/kg

name: Le Col SUB6 Endurance Series
description: Starting on Tuesday 22nd October at 06:30 MST, join RAAM World Record Holder Lucas Clarke for the Le Col SUB6 Endurance Series on Zwift. These weekly sessions are crafted to help you develop your endurance capacity.  Whether you’re preparing for ultra-distance events like Race Across America (RAAM), Transcontinental and Mallorca 312, aiming for your first ultra or looking to refine your training, this series is your key to mastering endurance.

name: US Military Endurance Sports Fun Run
description: Welcome to the US Military Endurance Sports weekly “Fun Run”. this is a run at your own pace event that will explore different Zwift worlds weekly at varying distances and/or times. The leader typically starts at a 9:15 pace with added increments at a faster pace along the way. Our goal is to provide a platform for all to enjoy while increasing awareness about the USMES organization which is an endurance-based team of Activeduty military, veterans including friends and family. Activity Duty members are encouraged to place *USMES* in their Zwift name and to check out our Facebook Group at UZR2- USMES Zwift Ride and Run. #FitForDutyFitForLife

eventSubgroups.name: US Military Endurance Sports Fun Run (E)

name: Stage 1 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 1
Route: Flat Out Fast
Date: March 16-22

The adventure kicks off on Flat Out Fast—where the name of the game is no hills and Big Spin prizes galore!

name: Indoor(national) Cycling Club
description:
Indoor(national) Cycling Club. A series of fast-paced rides presented by Pas Normal Studios and Zwift. Spicy pace, led by our community. 
 
Route: Leith Hill After Party - 41.5km / 435m

Ride Leader: Graham Taylor
 
 
All rides in the Indoor(national) Cycling Club series emulate the experience of a proper training ride. Pace: high. Town sign sprints? Why yes. We’ll make sure to bring the pace, good mood, and friendly atmosphere with our crew of ride leaders. Once you complete one of our rides in the series, you unlock the Pas Normal Studios kit in your Zwift locker.

name: 🔥 SWX Thursday Threshold – by Coach Cindy 🚀
description:
Push your limits every Thursday with SWX Threshold — a focused effort session built to improve your FTP and race performance.
Designed by Coach Cindy (Train Smart = Race Stronger), this session targets sustained high-intensity intervals just below or at threshold. It’s not easy, but it works. Bring your grit, legs, and a full bottle.

• All levels welcome
• Stay-together mode enabled
• Late join allowed

Connect and learn more about who we are:
📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/shark_worx_swx
🌐 Website: https://bit.ly/Visit_Coach_Cindy

eventSubgroups.name: 🔥 SWX Thursday Threshold – by Coach Cindy 🚀 (E)

name: DBR Base Endurance Ride
description:
Join the Danish Bike Riders for an endurance workout that will boost your aerobic threshold and train your body to use fat as energy rather than quickly depleting your glycogen stores. Continual efforts will boost your race performance and endurance.

This ride will have a ride leader, but the point is that everyone rides at their own level.

Stay in the blue power zone (zone 2) for the duration of the workout. You will quickly form grupettos with people of your own fitness level.

To bring up the power graph, press G on your PC or Mac. Tap the screen and the graph icon for IOS and Android.

E category - But 1.0-5.0 W/kg avg.

Official site : Danish Bike Riders - https://www.facebook.com/DanishBikeRiders

We highly recommend doing one of the FTP tests as the estimated FTP can be inaccurate and make the difficulty level of the workouts too high for your current fitness level.

For more info on FTP go to: https://support.zwift.com/hc/en-us/articles/210208083-What-is-FTP-and-how-is-it-used-in-Zwift

#dbr

name: Epic Run Crew: Thursday Thunder
description:
It’s nearing the end of the work week. Perhaps it’s time to pick up the pace and go for it? Bring on the thunderous feet!

This is a 45 minute group run. You are welcome to run at your own pace (AYOP). Feel free to continue running after you finish the 45 minutes, or end it early. It’s up to you.

Chatting is encouraged! Talk about food. Make a funny observation. Whatever. We don’t judge. Just have some fun!

Epic Run Crew is based in Vancouver, BC, Canada. We were founded as an in-person club in 2021 and then joined Zwift in June 2022.

Use the Zwift Companion app to join the Epic Run Crew club, for access to exclusive member-only group runs.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/epicruncrew2/
Instagram: @epicruncrew

name: WTRL Team Time Trial - Zone 13
description:
WTRL Team Time Trial #365

Our weekly WTRL Team Time Trial (TTT) allows teams of 3-8 Zwifters to race against the clock together throughout the day to achieve the fastest possible times. Teams are arranged into WTRL's unique Coffee Classes and feature both women's only Coffee Classes and mixed gender too.
  
 There are 30 racing events and teams can be registered up 30 minutes before each race event starts at www.wtrl.racing/ttt-home/ and you can pick your start time from the available slots. Each team is issued a unique RacePass that must be clicked by each team member to gain access to the event for sign-up. You'll also be able to check out the rules, course records and results which update live throughout the day.
  
 Teams & Riders must be registered with www.WTRL.racing and you'll need to be sharing data, via your Zwift Profile Connections with www.zwiftpower.com.
  
 If you are looking for a team, head to our dedicated WTRL TTT Facebook page where plenty of teams are always happy to welcome guest riders and new team mates (https://www.facebook.com/groups/WTRLTTT). Not on Facebook? Feel free to drop us an email with your preferred WTRL TTT Zone and current Zwift Category 
  
 #wtrl #wtrlttt

name: Team Italy Improve Uphill by Vins D'Agrosa
description:
Do you want to improve uphill? You are in the right place, 3 loads weeks, 1 unload, check on the workout graph for the specific description.
All written by Vins D'Agrosa, please add tag Iya after your Surname
Join our Team Italy Club here on Companion, Join us into the Team Italy's Discord Channel https://discord.gg/c7PGKGv
This is the Facebook group of Team Italy https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly and Strava Club of Team Italy https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwift_italy
Join us! Have fun! Ride On!
#teamitaly #jersey unlock #workout

eventSubgroups.name: Team Italy Improve Uphill by Vins D'Agrosa (D)
Team Italy Improve Uphill by Vins D'Agrosa (E)

name: SWX Breaching Race
description:
SWX Breaching Race

Push your limits with the SWX Breaching Race — a focused, fast-paced event designed to sharpen your race craft and elevate your intensity.
Expect a solid 20–30 minute effort with varied routes, ideal for building form, testing tactics, and staying sharp in a competitive setting. Whether you're chasing points or just looking to race smart, this one delivers.

• All levels welcome
• Open to all categories

Connect and learn more about who we are:
📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/shark_worx_swx
🌐 Website: https://bit.ly/Visit_Coach_Cindy

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: Outseason Thursdays with Endurance Nation
description:
Transform Your Winter with Endurance Nation’s OutSeason Program!

Get ready to build next-level fitness with our 9-week OutSeason cycling series! Join us every Tuesday and Thursday for a focused, one-hour session designed to boost your strength, endurance, and power. With just two workouts per week, you’ll start building winter strength that will prepare you to reach your goals next season. This program is tried-and-true, with over 10,000 athletes using it to succeed in cycling and triathlon for over 16 years.

Why settle for base miles alone when you can add targeted intensity this winter? Join Endurance Nation and see what a season of smart training can do. Discover more about the OutSeason at www.endurancenation.us/zwift.

Love these workouts? Check out the club for more opportunities to train with us! We offer social rides on Saturdays, Sundays and Mondays each week — they are great alternates to these scheduled workouts!

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: DZR After Party Series
description:
Danish Zwift Racers proudly presents the DZR After Party Series.

A weekly recurring event series with carefully selected routes all finishing uphill (aka after parties). Both official after party routes and other routes with unofficial after party finishes. Check out the route details at https://dzrracingseries.com/ to get familiar with the route and especially the after-party finish. A race calendar can be found here as well.

For further information on Danish Zwift Racers please visit https://www.facebook.com/groups/dzrteam/

name: T-VGN 🌱 Tornado
description: Welcome to Team Vegan’s Tornado! This is a chance to test yourself with race events each week. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

name: SYN Workout Hour
description:
Time to fire up those legs! Every Thursday the SYN Global Cycling Club brings you the SYN Workout Hour—a weekly session built to boost your fitness and keep you sweating with a smile. Each week we mix it up: sometimes it’s steady FTP-building grind, sometimes it’s short sharp power blasts, and other times it’s smooth aerobic work. Whatever’s on the menu, you’ll come out stronger.

60MIN NO DROP WORKOUT
Zwift keeps us together, so you’ll hit your own FTP targets without getting left behind. Sessions are round 60 minutes of solid training, warm-up to cool-down.

UNLOCK THE SYNDICATE CLUB KIT
Finish our High Intensity Sessions on Zwift and unlock the Inverted SYN Kit (black jersey, white bib) in your garage, so you can wear the colors of our cycling club in any other ride on Zwift.

DISCOVER MORE IN THE SYN ZWIFT CLUB
Enjoyed this ride? Feel free to join our Zwift Club (SYN Cycling Club), and discover all our events:
https://bit.ly/SYNZwiftClub

name: Stage 2 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!


Stage 2
Route: Mayan San Remo
Date: March 23-29

Keep the prize wheels and bike wheels spinning as we move it over to Mayan San Remo for Stage 2.

name: Bikealicious Friday comes early, Gratitude ride!
description:
This is a banded ride.



Kick off the weekend a little ahead of schedule with a ride that’s all about good vibes, easy company, and a whole lot of gratitude. Spin light, push hard, or just cruise in the glow of “Friday energy"



This is your weekly reminder that movement is a privilege, community is magic, and Fridays are a state of mind. All riders welcome, all levels catered for, all smiles encouraged. Bring your legs, your laughter, and one thing you’re grateful for.



 Stronger together.

eventSubgroups.name: Bikealicious Friday comes early, Gratitude ride! (E)
eventSubgroups.description: A casual ride with your club members on a flat route.

name: GXY HIGH LOOSEY GOOSEY [1.9-2.3WKG] CAT D
description:
Welcome to GXY High Loosey Goosey!

This is our mid-week social light workout social spin.

We ride as a team, we help and support each other with the primary aim of keeping the group together with the help of an excellent sweep team and disciplined riders at the front brought together by experienced leaders.

GXY are a friendly and supportive club who strive to help others succeed. We are looking forward to riding with you.

If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally via our Facebook link or by the email below:

https://www.facebook.com/groups/galaxycyclingclub/
https://www.strava.com/clubs/989894
https://www.instagram.com/galaxycyclingclub

name: Hercules - The Thursday Social
description:
Join The Thursday Social Ride Out - a super friendly and inclusive group ride on Zwift! We ride with the rubber band enabled, so no one gets dropped, and everyone stays together no matter the pace.

Expect great chat, good vibes, quizzes, fun facts and a welcoming atmosphere for all riders, whether you're new to Zwift or a seasoned pro.

Please join our Zwift Club at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/d6581e47-deb2-46ed-a278-5777d5d2fd0f/home

Please join our Facebook Group at https://www.facebook.com/groups/2606407819659263/

Please join us online at https://herculesrunningandtri.com/

Please join us on Strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/herculesrunningandtriclub

If you would like to own our famous Pink & Black Club Kit in real life, please order at https://tinyurl.com/herculestrirun 

#jerseyunlock

name: MHG Run Club
description:
Back in January 2021, Eddie Izzard ran 32 marathons in 31 days. Our community rallied together and joined the action all month long. This inspired us to create the MHG Run Club, which continues Eddie’s incredible efforts of making humanity great.

The MHG Run Club motivates and supports everybody, whether you’re looking for tips to achieve your training goals or looking for a group to bond and socialize with. A light-minded Zwift treadmill runners group, for runners of all abilities, friendly chat and a good laugh :)

Please feel free to join me Clive Finnimore with our official MHG Run Club Lunchtime 5K @ 8KPH on Monday, Wednesday & Fridays, See you there soon :)

Please also join us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/252358412942586/
Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/MHGA
Keep on Running

name: Film My Run 500 with NoblePro
description:
Join Stephen Cousins and NoblePro for a 500 metre climb. Set your treadmill to 12% incline and run 4.2km of distance to reach 500 metres elevation. If your treadmill doesn't go that high, set it as high as it will go and join us anyway!

The run will be progressive starting at a walking pace of 5kph rising to 7kph for the final kilometre. Get on to the balls of your toes and get your calf muscles to do the work. This continuous uphill effort will help build strength and endurance for those hilly trail runs

This event is sponsored by the ever popular Noble Pro treadmills. You can get a discount on a NoblePro SMART treadmill from this link https://zwift.run/noble-pro

You can watch the run on the live stream at http://youtube.com/ZwiftRunChannel

Join the FMR Run Club for more fun events at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/6afca04c-8fac-4ffa-b700-f27a73d7f3dd/join

name: Vitality for UNICEF Group Ride
description:
Vitality, in partnership with UNICEF, is teaming up with Zwift for a series of great social rides for a fantastic cause. Don’t miss out. Join our social rides of 45 minutes to one hour and do your part to give kids a head start. Keeping you active and helping Vitality and UNICEF vaccinate millions of children worldwide.

We encourage everyone to stay together for this social ride. Every ride completion will help UNICEF vaccinate a child against polio.

About Vitality:
 
Guided by a core purpose of making people healthier, Vitality is the leader in shared-value by creating healthy behavior changes in insurance. By blending technology, data, incentives, and behavioural science, Vitality inspires healthy changes in individuals and organizations. 

In partnership with UNICEF, Vitality aims to vaccinate millions of children against polio by donating vaccines on behalf of participants who complete the Vitality for UNICEF Ride series events.

Furthermore, the partnership with Zwift has been established as part of Vitality’s global pledge to get 100 million people 20% more active by 2025 through incentives to live healthier, more active lifestyles.

name: The Cycle Nation Sindowner Thursday Fumble
description:
Welcome to the Cycle Nation Sindowner Thursday Fumble. Join us for a sometimes challenging,  but always fun social ride.

This is not a race and we encourage you to stay with the ride leader (yellow beacon) if you are feeling strong,  you are more than welcome to assist with sweeping duties at the back of the ride helping dropped riders rejoin the group. We are looking forward to hosting you for the ride.

eventSubgroups.name: The Cycle Nation Sindowner Thursday Fumble (D)

name: Zwift Women's Training Club Workout
description:
Welcome to the Zwift Women’s Training Club workouts! 

ZWTC is your community for fun and fitness. Our weekly workouts will take you through some of Zwift’s most popular training plans, and with the flexibility to join in any time, regardless of where we are in the plan! Get the most out of your Zwifting with training designed by world-class coaches, like 3x Olympic Gold medalist, Kristin Armstrong!

The group workouts will be held every 3 hours UTC on Tuesdays and Thursdays. We’ll also offer recovery rides every 3 hours on Wednesdays - be on the look out for special guests joining those! Our main goal is to provide you with a consistent experience week in and week out, to challenge yourself in a supportive group setting, making friends and getting fit along the way! 

Join the Zwift Women’s Training Club to connect with new ride friends, ask questions, and get advice from experts.  https://www.zwift.com/clubs/ZwiftWTC/join

Love these workouts? Check out the club for more opportunities to train with us! We offer social rides every 3 hours on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays in addition to the Tuesday/Thursday workouts.

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

description:
Joignez les membres 5.W.4.T pour un entrainement axé sur le développement du FTP (Functional Threshold Power). 

Rejoignez-nous pour une séance d'entraînement stimulante conçue pour améliorer votre puissance aérobie et votre endurance!
Mode élastique activé.

Suivez-nous sur Facebook pour rester informé de nos autres événements : http://fb.5W4T.com
À bientôt! 
L'Équipe 5.W.4.T

name: Team Italy Fat Burn Ride
description:
This ride aim to be a Fat Burn ride for D rider category - Z1 for other rider category riders

The rhythm will be 1,6/2wkg, please follow the Leader instructions during the ride, the fence will be the killer one.

During Zwift Racing League period the Route will be based on the following stage otherwise it will be a rotative selection in order to find the perfect route to make a Fat Burn ride with fellow riders.

Your jersey will be auto selected on Team Italy, please add the ITA tag in your name.

This is our Facebook group https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitalyOpens a new window e Strava club del Team Italy https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwift_italyOpens a new window Unisciti a noi! Divertiti! Ride On!

-

Benvenuti alla Team Italy Ride Brucia Grassi

Ride programmata per un lavoro bruciagrassi per i rider di categoria D, Z1 per le altre categorie

Il Ritmo sarà compreso tra 1,6 e 2 Watt per Chilo segui quindi tutti i messaggi del leader in modo da rimanere informato durante la ride sull'utilizzo della barriera (fence) per tenere il gruppo compatto.

Durante i periodi di Zwift Racing League il percorso sarà quello della tappa successiva altrimenti sarà scelto a rotazione per un lavoro di brucia grassi.

Il Leader avrà una freccia gialla. La tua maglia verrà selezionata automaticamente e tutti i ciclisti appariranno con lo stesso kit.

name: ZZRC Group Workout
description:
A very warm welcome to our ZZRC Group Workout. 

Our rides are open to all riders, the category enforcement merely allows us to ensure a safe and quality ride for you the riders and for our group.

This is banded ride designed to put some structure and FUN into our social rides on Zwift! Each week we will showcase a different Zwift workout. 

The power targets are based on your individual FTP so come join us as we encourage each other to elevate our fitness to new heights on Zwift. 

Join the ZZRC Club on the Companion App, follow us on Facebook, but, most of all, enjoy the ride. 

#zzrc

name: Le Blue Power Ride
description:
Le mode élastique favorise la cohésion au sein du groupe, permettant à chacun d’exprimer pleinement ses compétences. Ainsi, les défis ne deviennent plus des obstacles, mais plutôt des occasions de partage convivial et de plaisir collectif, transformant l’effort en une expérience enrichissante.

Discutez sur Discord /  Discuss on Discord: https://discord.gg/HgFb6SThT
Notre Facebook: https://m.facebook.com/groups/907351331715445

"Please add “(Gang)” at the end of your username in your Zwift profile.   Merci de mettre (Gang) à la fin de votre pseudo dans votre profil zwift 
"
Ruberband mode encourages group cohesion, allowing everyone to fully express their abilities.      Challenges are no longer obstacles, but opportunities for friendly sharing and collective enjoyment, turning effort into a truly rewarding experience.

name: WTRL Team Time Trial - Zone 17
description:
WTRL Team Time Trial #365

Our weekly WTRL Team Time Trial (TTT) allows teams of 3-8 Zwifters to race against the clock together throughout the day to achieve the fastest possible times. Teams are arranged into WTRL's unique Coffee Classes and feature both women's only Coffee Classes and mixed gender too.
  
 There are 30 racing events and teams can be registered up 30 minutes before each race event starts at www.wtrl.racing/ttt-home/ and you can pick your start time from the available slots. Each team is issued a unique RacePass that must be clicked by each team member to gain access to the event for sign-up. You'll also be able to check out the rules, course records and results which update live throughout the day.
  
 Teams & Riders must be registered with www.WTRL.racing and you'll need to be sharing data, via your Zwift Profile Connections with www.zwiftpower.com.
  
 If you are looking for a team, head to our dedicated WTRL TTT Facebook page where plenty of teams are always happy to welcome guest riders and new team mates (https://www.facebook.com/groups/WTRLTTT). Not on Facebook? Feel free to drop us an email with your preferred WTRL TTT Zone and current Zwift Category 
  
 #wtrl #wtrlttt

name: NoPinz R3R - Double Crit 1/2
description:
Welcome to this NoPinz R3R Race. The rules are simple....
Please use ZwiftPower's Minimum Category on your profile for race entry.
Cats A, and B will require a power source (power meter or smart trainer) and heart rate monitor.
Cat C will require power source (power meter or smart trainer) and heart rate monitor for podium spots.
Podium finishers in Cat A are expected to dual (power) record and to make analysis publicly available on ZwiftPower; they must also be using a direct drive trainer or power meter.
**Elite level performances are also expected to be supported by dual (power) recordings from reputable power sources or easily verifiable outside data. This applies to those with a history of such performances.
** 5.2 w/kg (20 mins); 6 w/kg (5 mins); 9.8 w/kg (1 min)
Zwift Activities must be saved publicly.
Please also maintain an open and active Strava profile to facilitate organiser inquiry.
Please see http://www.zwiftpower.com for finalised race results. The race is brought to you by NoPinz please visit https://nopinz.com/product-tag/subzero/ All subzero kit can be custom made in any design.

name: Hexa'Quiz Ride
description:
[FRANÇAIS]
HEXA'Quiz Ride, c'est une compétition sympa où on combine vélo et culture
générale. On pédale tranquillement tout en répondant à des questions sur
l'appli Kahoot! Tous les 4/5 kilomètres, une question arrive. Celui qui
répond bien et vite gagne.

On organise également un classement mensuel pour ajouter un peu de piquant
à l'aventure.

Les questions portent sur divers aspects du cyclisme : les exploits des
professionnels, les différents types de vélos, l'univers virtuel de Zwift,
et tout ce qui touche de près ou de loin à cette passionnante discipline
sportive.

Venez vous amuser et défier vos amis ! Que le meilleur gagne ! C'est le
moment de montrer vos connaissances tout en pédalant !

[ENGLISH]
HEXA'Quiz Ride is a fun competition combining cycling and general
knowledge. You pedal quietly while answering questions on the Kahoot! app.
Every 4/5 kilometers, a question comes up. Whoever answers well and quickly
wins.

A monthly ranking is also organized to add a little spice to the adventure.

The questions focus on various aspects of cycling: the exploits of the
professionals, the different types of bikes, the virtual world of Zwift,
and anything else related to this exciting sport.

Come and have fun and challenge your friends! May the best man win! It's
time to show off your knowledge while you pedal!

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel || Advanced
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

name: Coffee Lovers High Time for a Third Place
description:
Have you heard of Third Place? 

We are sure that most of us are attracted to Zwift not only because of the sporting side, but also because of its social component. The opportunity to do something healthy not as a statistician, logging kilometres and hours pedalling, but at the same time enjoying communication, laughing, learning new things, sharing emotions, memories and experiences. So that the hour does not drag on endlessly. That the sublime taste of the combination of sport, joy and endorphins inspires you, making you want to come back again. 

Let this event be your Third Place!

eventSubgroups.name: Coffee Lovers High Time for a Third Place (D)

name: 😈🍍Chase Week - Bait and Ditch
description:
🚕🚕🚕🚕🚕IT'S CHASE WEEK🚗🚗🚗🚗🚗 
 
Yellow will hold 2.5- 2.8 WKG  
Red will lead a group chasing down yellow to see how many times they can lap yellow. Red group will be 3.5 - 5.0 WKG at front of the pack 2.5 - 3.5 WKG in draft.  
 
As this is a small loop course push yourself, go with red, and if you blow up ease back to yellow. Or sit with yellow and cruise for steady endurance miles. 
 
Jump on the PAIN🚂, we'll hurt ourselves to hurt you, so you can hurt someone else come race day...choo choo...all aboard 🍍🚂 

Week 1 Sprints
Week 2 KOM
Week 3 Ramps
Week 4 Hunt
Week 5 Chase
Week 6 PR Lap
Week 7 Circuits of Death

name: SZR Group Workout by Thyr
description:
Ride with Mattias Thyr at Ovning.se in courtesy of SZR as he makes workouts for the one who cares and lets him.
Nudging the grit! The home of the unstructured GWOs. Here you got motivating rides together with friends. Skip plans, just a exercise your pixels in a group is good for you, both mentally and physically. Every 6th week we do a #maxtjuga (as we say in Sweden) or a the 20min FTP test together.

On his 8th years and +350 GWO:s he created and lead personally on Zwift. Come join and, "Aim for the stars!

• The workout is approximately 60 minutes long and can be done either fasted or fueled. I personally recommend lots of sugars.
• The goal is to explore and feel the differences between various fueling strategies.
• Remember to adjust your calorie intake to match your energy needs before during and after the session.
• This workout is based on a percentage of your FTP (Functional Threshold Power).
• Ensure your FTP is accurate and up-to-date for the best experience.
• If needed, perform an FTP Test a day before on Zwift prior the workout.
• Use the Zwift Companion App or the Page Up/Down keys on your computer to adjust the FTP bias by 10% up or 25% down, helping you dial in the effort level to suit your preferences.

name: ZLDR No One Left Behind
description:
Come join ZLDR for a nice go AYOP (at your own pace) event. All participants whether running or walking are encouraged to participate. Our leads will be taking this time to walk and chat and basically encourage the heck out of you to just keep moving regardless of your pace!

ZLDR is a group of diverse people, from speed demons to walkers, from people just getting to their first 5k to ultra runners. We are here to support your on-foot dreams and help you develop your running/walking skills. We are a collective group of supportive and experienced runners and walkers who want to help you set and achieve new goals!

For more ZLDR fun and support, join our groups on social media platforms:

Facebook Group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZLDR2020
Strava Club: https://www.strava.com/clubs/zldr2020
Instagram page: https://www.instagram.com/zldr.2020/
Discord Invitation (not required for the run)
https://discord.com/invite/PuFctEnWynq

name: Velo29 Dream Bike Race Series
description:
Join Velo29 for a race up the Alp!
21 bends of suffering, a great fun work out!
In Jan and Feb each year the race is streamed live to the Velo29 Facebook page with commentary!

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Grand Masters League
description:
Welcome to the Grand Masters League! Join passionate cyclists from around the world in this race series designed specifically for competitors of all ages. Each week, we will take on challenging courses in different Zwift worlds, testing your endurance, strategy, and speed.

Rules and Race Format
To ensure fair competition and an epic racing experience, these are the rules you must follow:

Riders will be grouped into age categories to ensure balanced and fair competition:

>     Elite (Cat A) → Up to 29 years old
>     M30 (Cat B) → 30 to 39 years old
>     M40 (Cat C) → 40 to 49 years old
>     M50 (Cat D) → 50 to 59 years old
>     M60+ (Cat E) → 60 years old and up

To appear in the official results on ZwiftPower, it is mandatory to:

Be registered on ZwiftPower.
Use a heart rate monitor (HRM).
Connect a smart trainer or power meter as a power source. (Dual recording is encouraged).

Make sure you meet all requirements to avoid disqualification.

eventSubgroups.name: Elite (Cat A) → Up to 29 years old
M60+ (Cat E) → 60 years old and up

name: 3R PedalPlay Interval Ride [~3.3-3.7w/kg avg]
description:
This is a 3R Group Ride Event. Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that no riders ride off the front of the group. The event is designed as part of 3R’s package of #ProStyleTraining events to assist with the attainment of your training goals and may include intervals over and below the ride average parameters. This is not a race so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong, please help the keeper beacon (Red) to assist other riders back to the pack. We welcome good banter and aim to create a fun, social atmosphere for your training. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/ #Team3R #Ride3R #RideRaceRaise.

#3r

name: Group Run 5k
description:
DESCRIPTION

Join us for a 5k group run.   It's run-at-your-own-pace and all are welcome! 

Pick the closest pace group for you, but all groups will start together and you are free to fall back and run ahead. The pace groups designate average pace for the duration of the run. Most groups will start slower and finish faster than the indicated pace. Feel free to mix in some intervals and race your friends.

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Volcano Circuit CCW
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: La ClaZiquisima
description:
🇪🇸 🚴‍♂️🔥 LA CLAZIQUÍSIMA DE ZABI 🔥🚴‍♀️

¿Tienes lo que hace falta para rendir cada jueves? 😈

💥 Rutas diferentes cada semana

name: Car Chase / Course Poursuite Ghost Team
description:
Le but de cette course est de faire gagner sa catégorie (A, B, C, D) en collaborant tous ensemble pour arriver les premiers sur la ligne d'arrivée avant que la catégorie supérieure ne vous rattrape.
En fin de compte, le vainqueur de la course permet à sa catégorie de remporter la victoire, plutôt que d'obtenir une victoire individuelle.

Détails des courses : Événement du mois de Ghost Team <https://www.zwifteur.com/ghost-team/evenement-du-mois>

Anglais :

The aim of this race is to win your category (A, B, C, D) by collaborating together to cross the finish line first before the higher category catches up.
Ultimately, the winner of the race ensures their category wins rather than achieving a solitary victory.

Race details: Ghost Team's Event of the Month <https://www.zwifteur.com/ghost-team/evenement-du-mois>

name: SZR Pick n Mix
description:
Please join the SZR Pick n Mix Team as we wind down on a Thursday evening and prepare for the weekend ahead.

The goal with an SZR Ride is to focus on the Group and keeping the Group together while having fun to make the time fly fast! You should aim to sit between the fence and the yellow / red beacon.

The ride tempo is shown next to the ride category, this is rider weight / gender dependant.

Note that the average is for the total ride! There will be variations over or under the average during the ride due to the terrain.

There may well be optional intervals lead by either the Red or Yellow beacon, but one beacon will remain at the ride pace for those not wanting to participate in the interval.

After climbs / descents we will try to focus on getting the back of the group together.

Please always follow ride leader instructions.

name: SZR Climbing Crew
description:
Ride description
Please join the SZR Climbing Crew as we ride some of the more challenging bumpy routes each week.
After climbs / descents we will try to focus on getting the back of the group together.
The goal with an SZR Ride is to focus on the Group and keeping the Group together while having fun to make the time fly fast! You should aim to sit between the fence and the yellow / red beacon.
The ride tempo is shown next to the ride category, this is rider weight / gender dependant.
Note that the average is for the total ride! There might be variations above or under the average during the ride.
Please always follow ride leader instructions.

name: Watts More Different Watts!
description:
Watts More! Ride with friends in challenging events. Take on your challenge in Watts, elevation or duration! 
 
Every Thursday there’s a different training at Different Watts! A ride at the top of cat D which goes during the ride frequently into cat C. Take the challenge to keep up with the rideleader. The average pace will be 2.2-2.4 W/kg 

From October until March there is a training with a rideleader. From April until September we chose challenging routes for you. 

Check out our weekly ride announcements on the Watts More Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/1151203888657006/?ref=share  

 

Join Watts More on Zwift https://www.zwift.com/clubs/d6afeaa7-e754-478a-b68d-2a794648fa02/home  

 

More Watts More events: 
Rendurance! (C) 2.2-2.6 W/kg, Saturday 9.00 AM CET  
To the Top! (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Sunday 9.00 AM CET  
Build more Watts! (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Tuesday 19.00 CET

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: NoPinz R3R - Double Crit 2/2
description:
Welcome to this NoPinz R3R Race. The rules are simple....
Please use ZwiftPower's Minimum Category on your profile for race entry.
Cats A, and B will require a power source (power meter or smart trainer) and heart rate monitor.
Cat C will require power source (power meter or smart trainer) and heart rate monitor for podium spots.
Podium finishers in Cat A are expected to dual (power) record and to make analysis publicly available on ZwiftPower; they must also be using a direct drive trainer or power meter.
**Elite level performances are also expected to be supported by dual (power) recordings from reputable power sources or easily verifiable outside data. This applies to those with a history of such performances.
** 5.2 w/kg (20 mins); 6 w/kg (5 mins); 9.8 w/kg (1 min)
Zwift Activities must be saved publicly.
Please also maintain an open and active Strava profile to facilitate organiser inquiry.
Please see http://www.zwiftpower.com for finalised race results. The race is brought to you by NoPinz please visit https://nopinz.com/product-tag/subzero/ All subzero kit can be custom made in any design.

name: Workout 2 - Zwift Camp: Breakthrough
description:
Outdoor miles are right around the corner, and these five Zwift Camp: Breakthrough workouts get you ready for them. Sharpen your speed, smooth your pedal stroke, and build the strength you need for hills and longer rides outside.

Workout 2: Body Control
This one’s got a little bit of everything: single-leg drills, hand positioning, and calm upper-body control are all on deck, keeping you confident and smooth from start to finish.

name: TSE POKER CHALLENGE 1/4
description:
TSE Poker Challenge: Virtual Cycling Competition
The TSE Poker Challenge is a virtual cycling competition organized by the TSE club, taking
place every Thursday in March. The event uses a "tiny" format, consisting of short mini-stages.

Calendar and Structure
The competition includes 4 events, each made up of 4 mini-stages lasting approximately 15
minutes each:
● March 12: Set in France (Paris), featuring stages such as the Champs-Élysées and Ven Top.
● March 19: Set in Scotland, with routes like the Glasgow Crit and Scotland Smash.
● March 26: Set in Watopia (e.g., Volcano Circuit, Mayan San Remo).
● April 2: Set between Makuri Islands and Watopia.

Race Times (Italian Time): 19:05, 19:25, 19:45, and 20:05.

Regulations and Technical Requirements
The event is open to categories A, B, C, and D with Category Enforcement active.
● Equipment: You may choose your preferred bike, but Time Trial (TT) bikes are
prohibited.
● Mandatory: A heart rate monitor is required; zPower is not allowed.
● Settings: Drafting and steering are enabled, while Powerups are disabled.
● Scoring: A dynamic system is used based on the number of participants (e.g., 60 starters
= 60 points for 1st place, 1 point for the last).
● Penalties: Athletes who change categories during the tour will receive penalties.

Prizes and Benefits
● General Classification: Based on combined results from the four weeks.
● Real Prizes: Epicasport provides prizes for the overall winners.
● Discount: All participants unlock a 30% discount (on a minimum spend of €75) at
www.epicasport.com.

For technical support or team registrations, contact the organizers at 

Official Sites: * www.tsezwift.com * www.epicasport.com

name: CSPT club ride
description:
Welcome to CSPT; a cycling and running club with a difference. It's a place where members can meet up & have fun without any pressure to perform.

Whether you're short of motivation or inspiration then CSPT is the place for you. Drawing on years of experience from all walks of life and athletic experience we can help to motivate you to achieve whatever your goal is.

With CSPT - "YOU CAN"

This event has no leader, no fence and no rules because that's not what we're about. Stay with the bunch, often we are banded, we'll help you just enjoy being part of the club.

Please join our club : CSPT for further details.

eventSubgroups.name: CSPT club ride (E)
eventSubgroups.description: Volcano Flat Reverse

name: Team AMANI's Safari Ride
description:
Team AMANI's Safari Ride is an all category ride, organized by Team AMANI as a training and community engagement tool. Come train with the up and coming talent from East Africa!

Want to ride alongside some of the future stars of the gravel peloton? You've come to the right place! The routes may differ weekly and the rides will be periodically attended by the stars of  Team Amani as well as the future stars from our training facilities in Rwanda (Spoke Academy) and Kenya (the Amani House). We also welcome supporters of Team Amani to join and lead / take part.

So make sure to bring your A-game. There are 3 categories leaving from the start pen and everyone is able to sign-up according to their category and ride with the bunch. Challenge yourself on the segments we come across and make sure to set that PR!

Our goal is to stay as a group during the warming up, work hard at the climbs and regroup on the descents. We will break into a couple of different groups, so find your pace and grab a wheel. If you're feeling strong, pull a few friends across the flats to the hill.

So what is the AMANI Project? The AMANI project brings together initiatives aimed at enhancing access to the sport of cycling and creating opportunities for riders based in  East Africa. Our initiatives are:
- Team AMANI 
- Migration Gravel Race & Safari Gravel
- Amani House & Spoke Academy

Want to learn more or support the cause?

Follow us on our socials:

@teamamani
@spokeacademy

Check out:

https://www.teamamani.com/

name: PUMP: Loop Logic IV — Thursday (4 Laps)
description:
Same Distance. More Laps. Maximum Sass. ♥️🌶️

Welcome to Loop Logic, the weekday series where we prove that "going in circles" is actually a superpower. We’ve curated a week of routes that hit the 19–25km sweet spot with enough climbing to keep your glutes talking back to you.

The Logic is Simple:
We start with one big loop on Monday and add a lap every day until Friday. One lap is a warm-up, but five laps is a statement.

The PUMP Vibe:
Power in Numbers: No band here, ladies! This is your chance to find your rhythm, tuck into a friendly draft, and realize you’re much faster than you think.

Elevation is Our Love Language: Expect at least 100m of climb—just enough to feel the PUMP and earn that post-ride coffee.

Laughter > Watts: We ride hard, but we laugh harder. Whether you’re smashing a PR or just hanging onto a wheel for dear life, do it with a smile.

The Mission:
Show up for yourself, stay for the sisterhood, and let’s show exactly what women-powered logic looks like.

eventSubgroups.name: PUMP: Loop Logic IV — Thursday (4 Laps) (E)

name: Zwift Racing League Recon Ride (Team Not Pogi)
description:
This ZRL Group Recon Ride is led by Team Not Pogi (https://www.zwift.com/clubs/935a20fb-fe74-480c-9fdc-7b8ae0af0fb3).

Zwift Racing League Group Recon Rides are the official non-competitive Group Rides. Each one is hosted/run by a participating club and will feature racing tips and tricks for the race ahead, an opportunity to ask questions relating to Zwift Racing League and to preview the full course for Tuesday’s ZRL races.

THE AIM
With experienced ride leaders and Zwifters from a reputable Zwift Club, this is your opportunity to ask questions about all things ZRL-related. You'll be able to learn useful course and team tactics and if you are new to ZRL - perhaps even find a team to race with too!

There are multiple Group Recon Rides to choose from each day at various times and each will operate at the advertised paces (pace is based on your Zwift Pace Group).

WHAT IS THE ZRL?
Introducing the spectacular Zwift Racing League (ZRL) - a turbocharged online bike racing extravaganza that's rewriting the rules of competition. With a staggering 180 community divisions, 1,800 electrifying teams, and a whopping 14,000 fierce racers per 6-week round, the ZRL stands as the undisputed heavyweight champion of online bike racing competitions worldwide.

This high-octane spectacle is masterfully orchestrated by our powerhouse partners, WTRL, who leave no stone unturned in delivering an unparalleled racing experience. But remember, this race is an invitation-only affair, so if you dare to join the ranks of speed demons and thrill-seekers, you'll need to hitch a ride with one of the esteemed existing teams. Fear not, though, for WTRL's website (www.WTRL.racing) is your portal to all the insider intel - schedule, rules, and even a team that perfectly aligns with your fiery spirit!

If you want to gather your own team, you register for the next Round of ZRL at www.wtrl.racing/zwift-racing-league/.

#zrlrecon #wtrl #zrl #dirt

name: Group Run 10k
description:
Join us for a 10k group run.   It's run-at-your-own-pace and all are welcome! 

Pick the closest pace group for you, but all groups will start together and you are free to fall back and run ahead. The pace groups designate average pace for the duration of the run. Most groups will start slower and finish faster than the indicated pace. Feel free to mix in some intervals and race your friends. #pbt

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: WTRL Team Time Trial - Zone 21
description:
WTRL Team Time Trial #365

Our weekly WTRL Team Time Trial (TTT) allows teams of 3-8 Zwifters to race against the clock together throughout the day to achieve the fastest possible times. Teams are arranged into WTRL's unique Coffee Classes and feature both women's only Coffee Classes and mixed gender too.
  
 There are 30 racing events and teams can be registered up 30 minutes before each race event starts at www.wtrl.racing/ttt-home/ and you can pick your start time from the available slots. Each team is issued a unique RacePass that must be clicked by each team member to gain access to the event for sign-up. You'll also be able to check out the rules, course records and results which update live throughout the day.
  
 Teams & Riders must be registered with www.WTRL.racing and you'll need to be sharing data, via your Zwift Profile Connections with www.zwiftpower.com.
  
 If you are looking for a team, head to our dedicated WTRL TTT Facebook page where plenty of teams are always happy to welcome guest riders and new team mates (https://www.facebook.com/groups/WTRLTTT). Not on Facebook? Feel free to drop us an email with your preferred WTRL TTT Zone and current Zwift Category 
  
 #wtrl #wtrlttt

name: ZTPL Cycling Club Coffee Ride
description:
☀️Weszliśmy w sezon wiosenno-letni.☀️
Część naszych eventów zostaje w kalendarzu, ale może zdarzyć się tak że nie będzie na nich naszych liderów jazd.
Jeśli tak się zdarzy, gorąca prośba do Was o jazdę wg. założeń danego eventu.
Nasze eventy i liderzy ZTPL Cycling Club wrócą ponownie na jesień 2026.
Póki co RIDE ON i korzystajcie z pogody, a jeśli nie możecie to bawcie się dobrze podczas naszych eventów.


Zapraszamy na wspólny event z ZTPL Cycling Club. Pamiętajcie o wyborze właściwej grupy.

Z założenia nasze jazdy prowadzą liderzy, którzy pomagają trzymać peleton w ryzach. Jeśli podczas eventu zabraknie lidera, starajcie się trzymać tempo na które się umówiliśmy w momencie gdy dołączyliście do wybranej grupy. To od Was zależy jak będziecie się bawić 😊
Po ukończonym evencie, jeśli jechaliście z nami pierwszy raz, w Waszym wirtualnym garażu będzie czekała nasza teamowa koszulka!
◾️Grupy jazdą w założonym tempie, które macie podane przy każdej z nich w momencie dołączenia.
◾️ Jeśli chcecie przejechać jazdę w tempie Coffee Ride wybierzcie o jedną grupę niżej niż sugeruje wam wasze FTP lub zwiftpower :)
◾️ Wartości podane w opisach dotyczą średniego tempa z CAŁEJ jazdy (nie uwzględniają interwałów, które mogą wystąpić podczas np. podjazdów)
◾️ PAMIĘTAJCIE że podczas jazd grupowych NIE UŻYWAMY ROWERÓW CZASOWYCH!
◾️ Starajcie się pilnować peletonu i nie zgubić koła, samemu bardzo trudno jest odrobić stratę.
◾️ Proszę słuchajcie poleceń lidera, które podczas jazdy wyświetlane są na środku ekranu.
◾️ Lider, który prowadzi grupę podświetlony jest na żółto.
◾️ Starajcie się jechać blisko lidera, starając się go nie wyprzedać i nie wyjeżdżać przed bramę, która informuje Was że jedziecie za szybko.
Proszę stosujcie się do poleceń lidera!
Szczególnie jeśli lider zauważy że grupa się porwała.

◾️Podoba się Wam to co robimy? Zawsze możecie postawić Waszym kochanym administratorom oraz liderom naszych jazd wirtualną kawę :) https://buycoffee.to/ztplcc
◾️Jeśli chcecie sprawić sobie już teraz naszą nową teamową koszulkę ZTPL Cycling Club zapraszamy bezpośrednio na stronę https://inoni.cc/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
◾️Cała gama naszych koszulek oraz informacje o kolejnych Pre-Orderach znajdziecie na https://ztpl.cc/stroje-ztpl-cc/
◾️Nasze casualowe koszulki znajdziecie u Wintertala: https://wintertal.com/pl/133-ztplcc

[ENG]
☀️We’re now in the spring and summer season.☀️
Some of our events will stay in the calendar, but there may be times when our ride leaders won’t be there. If that happens, we’d really appreciate it if you could still ride according to the plan of the event.
Our ZTPL Cycling Club events will be back in autumn 2026.
For now — RIDE ON, enjoy the good weather, and if you can’t, just have a great time at our events.

We would like to invite you to ZTPL Cycling Club Coffee Ride.
In order to ride with Coffee Ride pace, please choose your group wisely.

Our rides are usually led by leaders who help keep the peloton in check. If there is no leader during the event, try to stick to the pace we agreed on when you joined the selected group.
◾️Group E is for total beginners with easy pace at around 1.3-1.7 wk/g
◾️Group D is a beginner group. The pace is calm, we learn how to ride in a Zwift peleton with 1.8-2.5 w/kg pace
◾️Group C is between group D and more advanced Group B. Pace 2.7-3.2 w/kg.
Important: If your FTP is around 2.5w/kg, this group will not be for you

◾️Please listen to the leader’s commands which are displayed in yellow during the whole ride. The leader who leads the group is highlighted in yellow. Please don’t pass the leader.
◾️Please follow the leader instructions! Especially if the leader notices that the group has been swept away. The leader is highlighted in yellow.
◾️At the and wait for the leader’s command: GOGOGO and start your sprint. Enjoy!

◾️If you would like to get yourself our ZTPL Cycling Club team jersey please visit our shop https://inoni.cc/en/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
or you can order our Casual T-Shirt and Hoodies https://wintertal.com/en/133-ztplcc

eventSubgroups.description:
Zapraszamy na wspólny event z ZTPL Cycling Club. Pamiętajcie o wyborze właściwej grupy.
Z założenia nasze jazdy prowadzą liderzy, którzy pomagają trzymać peleton w ryzach. Jeśli podczas eventu zabraknie lidera, starajcie się trzymać tempo na które się umówiliśmy w momencie gdy dołączyliście do wybranej grupy. To od Was zależy jak będziecie się bawić 😊
Po ukończonym evencie, jeśli jechaliście z nami pierwszy raz, w Waszym wirtualnym garażu będzie czekała nasza teamowa koszulka!

◾️ Proszę słuchajcie poleceń lidera, które podczas jazdy wyświetlane są na środku ekranu.

name: Stage 2: Pas Racing: Handful of Gravel || Advanced
description:
The PAS Racing Gravel Series brings the spirit and style of Pas Normal Studios to gravel racing on Zwift. Across four stages, you’ll take on demanding routes in a series designed to be raced flat out. Get a shiny new gravel bike from the Drop Shop and let it rip!

Complete any stage to win a brand new Pas Normal Jersey!

Badges are out—XP is in. Every finish fuels your progress. Earn up to 2000 XP for completing the series, including a massive 1000 XP from Stage One.

Stage 1
Route: Jungle Circuit
Date: April 6–12

The series kicks off on the Jungle Circuit in Watopia.. Line up, find your rhythm, and open the PAS Racing Series strong.

Stage 2
Route: Handful of Gravel
Date: April 13–19

The challenge builds. Handful of Gravel rewards the right setup and steady power across demanding terrain. Upgrade your build, join the next start line, and keep the momentum rolling.

Stage 3
Route: Yumezi Grit
Date: April 20–26

A brand new gravel racing route on Zwift. Fresh terrain. New lines to chase. Take on Yumezi Grit, test yourself against the field, and experience competitive gravel at its best.

Stage 4
Route: Serpentine 8
Date: April 27 – May 3

One final chance to line up and close out the PAS Racing Series. Hard routes. Real racing. Finish it strong.

MONTHLY GC COMPETITION

Looking for extra motivation? The Monthly GC (General Classification) Competition lets you track your progress across all stages. Each race counts—your times add up throughout the series, shaping the overall standings. At the end of the month, the fastest total time takes the win!
VIEW RESULTS: https://www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/pasracing2026

—------------------

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that in order to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

name: The HERD Thursday Social
description:
New to Zwift, just a little out of shape or recovering from injury? This is the group ride for you! All are welcome to join The Herd on this supportive and social event.

Respect the leader's pace and ride with the yellow beacon. This is NOT A RACE! Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help sweep the riders struggling in the back.

WE DO RUN THE FENCE! The fence is in place to ensure that new group riders don't get caught up with the flyers and have a bad experience. Bear in mind that the fence will move due to changes in speed on the inclines. We ask that you always ride with the yellow beacon. Please pay attention to messages from the ride leader regarding fence intervals and when to regroup.

Join us on Discord during the ride: https://discord.gg/Dr7ZtPV (Please use Push-To-Talk)
Check us out on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zHerd/

#herd

name: ZZRC Pedal Party Sub 2
description:
Welcome to our ZZRC Pedal Party Sub 2. This is a group ride, not a race, where we encourage riding together.

Our rides are open to all riders, the category enforcement merely allows us to ensure a safe and quality ride for you the riders and for our group.

In 2015 ZZRC was founded and are one of the oldest established clubs on Zwift .

YELLOW BEACON will pace between 1.7-1.9 on the ride , with a possible increase of watts on inclines or sprints , but the average for the whole ride will be sub 2 .

We strongly promote group riding so on most of our rides we will use the Fence to help encourage that. Using a fence ensures that the ride is not over paced .

In the event of falling off the back of the main group , you will need to pace well over group pace to bridge the gap and catch .

This is where our awesome ZZRC sweeps and Ride Buddies will help you return to group using their draft. They will give you clear encouraging instructions to aid this process .

Our crew are a caring bunch who dedicated a lot of hours to this club , but want you to have the best ride experience on Zwift

You will be fully supported and encouraged throughout the ride by the Leader, Sweeps and Ride Buddies .

Our rides do not allow the use of TT Bikes as they do not draft and will require you to push harder on the ride, and in these instances our Sweeps will not be able to help you .

Mountain bikes operate very similarly, minimum draft so more watts (effort) will be required for the ride and any chase backs to group .

All our rides have a 30 minute late join feature which allows you to rejoin if you have technical issues or you find yourself out of the group in the early stages of the ride. Using this feature SHOULD teleport you back into the main group with our YELLOW BEACON .


We love to have a chat on our rides so join us on our dedicated discord channel for our sub 2
https://discord.gg/RJ3dhbjCEp


TOP TIPS

1) Stay close to the ride leader (or just in front on climbs), don’t let a gap form and the elastic snap!

2) Stay away from the Fence – We don’t like to fry anyone

3) Most important of all . . . HAVE FUN AND ENJOY THE RIDE.

#zzrc

Don’t forget to join our ZZRC-We Pace Not Race Facebook page and our club on the companion app

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - ZG25 Climb Champs
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.
